elements.text: You have been asked to tutor for a class. The tutor before you was extremely well liked, and you worry you won't be able to live up to students' expectations. You remember that you know the material well, and when you think about tutoring for the course, you are...

elements.name: teaching_others--mental_health--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
